title: arctium vulgare
intro: Arctium vulgare, also known as the common burdock or great burdock, is a biennial thistle-like plant native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Arctium vulgare include relieving digestive problems, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Arctium vulgare can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can also be used in salves and creams for topical applications.
